META_TITLE: PadelDeck — Padel Score App for Amazfit Balance
META_DESCRIPTION: Track every padel point, game and set on your Amazfit Balance. Supports ventajas, golden point, tie-break and super tie-break. Free, offline, no phone needed.
META_OG_IMAGE_ALT: PadelDeck padel score tracker app — Amazfit Balance screenshot
HERO_SUB: Track every point, game and set live on your Amazfit Balance. No phone. No paper. Just play.
FEAT_1_DESC: Designed from scratch for a round 480×480 AMOLED display. Huge tap zones for gloved hands, instant haptic feedback per point, and zero eye strain in full sun.
FEAT_2_DESC: Ventajas or Golden Point at deuce. Tie-break (7 pts) or Super Tie-break (10 pts). Best of 1, 3 or 5 sets. Every padel rule variation — built in and ready.
FEAT_3_DESC: Mis-tap? Hit undo directly on the score screen — up to 20 levels deep. No match ever ruined by a wrong tap. Fast, reliable, always one swipe away.
FEAT_4_DESC: Every match automatically saved on your Amazfit Balance. Per-set breakdown, total points, duration and match format — your full padel record, on your wrist.
SCR_ALT_HOME: PadelDeck home screen on Amazfit Balance
SCR_ALT_SCORE: Live padel score tracking on Amazfit smartwatch
SCR_ALT_GAME_WIN: Game won overlay in PadelDeck padel app
SCR_ALT_STATS: Match stats view in PadelDeck for Amazfit
SCR_ALT_MATCH_END: Match end screen with set breakdown in PadelDeck
SCR_ALT_HISTORY: Padel match history list on Amazfit Balance
SCR_ALT_CONTINUE: Resume padel match in progress on smartwatch
HOW_1_DESC: Best of 1, 3 or 5 sets. Golden Point or ventajas at deuce. Tie-break and Super Tie-break on or off. Set your padel format once, then play.
HOW_2_DESC: Tap your side on the watch. PadelDeck tracks serve rotation automatically every game — and every two points in a tie-break.
HOW_3_DESC: Your half of the screen for your team, the other half for the opponents. One tap per point — no buttons to find, no menus to navigate.
HOW_4_DESC: After the last point, your match is saved on the watch automatically. Set breakdown, total points, duration and format — all on your wrist.
FAQ_1_Q: Which Amazfit watches does PadelDeck support?
FAQ_1_A: PadelDeck runs on the Amazfit Balance with Zepp OS 3.26 or later. Support for additional Zepp OS 3 devices is planned for future releases.
FAQ_2_A: Yes — completely free. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no account needed to track and review your matches.
FAQ_3_Q: Do I need my phone while playing?
FAQ_3_A: No. PadelDeck works fully offline on your Amazfit Balance. Your phone can stay in your bag. Scores, match history and settings are all managed directly on the watch.
FAQ_4_Q: Which padel scoring formats are supported?
FAQ_4_A: PadelDeck supports best of 1, 3 or 5 sets; ventajas (classic advantage) or Golden Point at deuce; configurable tie-break (first to 7); and Super Tie-break (first to 10) as the deciding set.
FAQ_5_Q: What happens if I tap the wrong side?
FAQ_5_A: Hit undo directly on the score screen. PadelDeck saves a full snapshot before every point, so you can reverse up to 20 consecutive points without losing any match data.
FAQ_6_Q: When will PadelDeck launch on the Zepp Marketplace?
FAQ_6_A: We're preparing the submission now. Drop your email above to be notified the moment PadelDeck goes live.
